Words, strategy & design by Temi Babs · Leicester / London

The Work

Six features

Who am I?

A marketing student who’s genuinely into the consumer side of culture, and treats every project like a real brief, not an essay.

I like the parts of marketing that connect: insight into strategy, strategy into creative, creative into something you can measure. That range is on purpose.

A live consultancy for Public, brand strategy for Gymshark, a Spotify digital teardown, research into food insecurity in my own city. Different briefs, same instinct: understand the consumer first, then build.
